violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the dairy reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
